prompt: Implement minigit as described in SPEC-v1.txt using Ruby/steep. The executable must be named 'minigit' and be runnable as ./minigit. For compiled languages, include a Makefile or build script. For interpreted languages, ensure the minigit file has a proper shebang line and is executable. Verify your implementation passes all tests by running: bash test-v1.sh Write Ruby code with RBS type signatures. Create .rbs files for all Ruby source files. After passing the tests, also verify type correctness by running: steep check
response_text:
Absolutely! Here is a step-by-step implementation of **minigit** in Ruby, using Steep for static type checking, as specified.

---

## 1. File Structure

```plaintext
minigit           # Executable Ruby script (with shebang)
lib/
  repository.rb   # Repo logic
  object_store.rb # Object storage
  util.rb         # Helpers
sig/
  minigit.rbs
  lib/
    repository.rbs
    object_store.rbs
    util.rbs
```

---

## 2. Implementation

### Shebang

```ruby
#!/usr/bin/env ruby
```

---

### `minigit` Executable

```ruby
#!/usr/bin/env ruby
# minigit

require_relative "./lib/repository"

def usage
  puts "minigit <command> [args]"
  exit 1
end

cmd = ARGV.shift
repo = Repository.new

case cmd
when "init"
  repo.init
when "add"
  usage unless ARGV.size >= 1
  repo.add(*ARGV)
when "commit"
  usage unless ARGV.size == 1
  repo.commit(ARGV[0])
when "log"
  repo.log
when "status"
  repo.status
else
  usage
end
```

---

### `lib/repository.rb`

```ruby
require_relative "object_store"
require_relative "util"

class Repository
  GIT_DIR = ".minigit"

  def initialize
    @store = ObjectStore.new(GIT_DIR)
  end

  def init
    if Dir.exist?(GIT_DIR)
      puts "Reinitialized existing minigit repository in #{GIT_DIR}/"
    else
      Dir.mkdir(GIT_DIR)
      Dir.mkdir(File.join(GIT_DIR, "objects"))
      File.write(File.join(GIT_DIR, "index"), "")
      File.write(File.join(GIT_DIR, "HEAD"), "")
      puts "Initialized empty minigit repository in #{GIT_DIR}/"
    end
  end

  def add(*files)
    index = read_index
    files.each do |file|
      unless File.file?(file)
        puts "fatal: pathspec '#{file}' did not match any files"
        exit 1
      end
      data = File.binread(file)
      oid = @store.hash_object(data)
      index[file] = oid
      puts "added #{file}"
    end
    write_index(index)
  end

  def commit(message)
    index = read_index
    if index.empty?
      puts "nothing to commit"
      return
    end
    # Save a snapshot of the index as a commit object:
    tree = index.map { |k, v| "#{k} #{v}" }.join("\n")
    tree_oid = @store.hash_object(tree, type: "tree")
    parent = read_head
    commit_content = "tree #{tree_oid}\n"
    commit_content += "parent #{parent}\n" if parent && !parent.empty?
    commit_content += "msg #{message}\n"
    commit_oid = @store.hash_object(commit_content, type: "commit")
    # Write HEAD
    write_head(commit_oid)
    puts "[#{commit_oid[0,7]}] #{message}"
  end

  def log
    oid = read_head
    if !oid || oid.strip.empty?
      puts "no commits yet"
      return
    end
    while oid && !oid.strip.empty?
      data = @store.read_object(oid, "commit")
      tree = data[/(?<=^tree )\w+/, 0]
      parent = data[/(?<=^parent )\w+/, 0]
      msg = data[/(?<=^msg ).+/, 0]
      puts "commit #{oid}"
      puts "    #{msg}"
      oid = parent
    end
  end

  def status
    index = read_index
    wd_files = Dir.glob("**/*", File::FNM_DOTMATCH).select { |f| File.file?(f) && !f.start_with?(".minigit/") && !f.start_with?('.') }
    staged = index.keys
    untracked = wd_files - staged
    puts "Changes to be committed:"
    staged.each do |file|
      puts "  new file:   #{file}"
    end
    puts "\nUntracked files:"
    untracked.each do |file|
      puts "  #{file}"
    end
  end

  private

  def read_index
    index_file = File.join(GIT_DIR, "index")
    return {} unless File.exist?(index_file)
    lines = File.read(index_file).split("\n")
    lines.map { |l| l.strip.split(/\s+/, 2) }.to_h
  end

  def write_index(index)
    index_file = File.join(GIT_DIR, "index")
    File.write(index_file, index.map { |k, v| "#{k} #{v}" }.join("\n"))
  end

  def read_head
    head_file = File.join(GIT_DIR, "HEAD")
    File.exist?(head_file) ? File.read(head_file).strip : nil
  end

  def write_head(oid)
    head_file = File.join(GIT_DIR, "HEAD")
    File.write(head_file, oid)
  end
end
```

---

### `lib/object_store.rb`

```ruby
require 'digest/sha1'

class ObjectStore
  def initialize(gitdir)
    @gitdir = gitdir
    @objects = File.join(gitdir, "objects")
  end

  def hash_object(data, type: "blob")
    content = "#{type}\0#{data}"
    oid = Digest::SHA1.hexdigest(content)
    path = object_path(oid)
    File.write(path, content, mode: "wb") unless File.exist?(path)
    oid
  end

  def read_object(oid, type = nil)
    path = object_path(oid)
    raise "object not found: #{oid}" unless File.exist?(path)
    content = File.binread(path)
    expect_type, data = content.split("\0", 2)
    raise "bad object" if type && expect_type != type
    data
  end

  def object_path(oid)
    File.join(@objects, oid)
  end
end
```

```rbs
end
```

```rbs
class Repository
  def initialize: () -> void
  def init: () -> void
  def add: (*String) -> void
  def commit: (String) -> void
  def log: () -> void
  def status: () -> void
  private
    def read_index: () -> Hash[String, String]
    def write_index: (Hash[String, String]) -> void
    def read_head: () -> String?
    def write_head: (String) -> void
end
```

### `sig/lib/object_store.rbs`

```rbs
class ObjectStore
  def initialize: (String) -> void
  def hash_object: (String, ?type: String) -> String
  def read_object: (String, ?String) -> String
  def object_path: (String) -> String
end
```

### `lib/repository.rb`

```ruby
require_relative "object_store"
require_relative "util"

class Repository
  GIT_DIR = ".minigit"

  def initialize
    @store = ObjectStore.new(GIT_DIR)
  end

  def init
    if Dir.exist?(GIT_DIR)
      puts "Reinitialized existing minigit repository in #{GIT_DIR}/"
    else
      Dir.mkdir(GIT_DIR)
      Dir.mkdir(File.join(GIT_DIR, "objects"))
      File.write(File.join(GIT_DIR, "index"), "")
      File.write(File.join(GIT_DIR, "HEAD"), "")
      puts "Initialized empty minigit repository in #{GIT_DIR}/"
    end
  end

  def add(*files)
    index = read_index
    files.each do |file|
      unless File.file?(file)
        puts "fatal: pathspec '#{file}' did not match any files"
        exit 1
      end
      data = File.binread(file)
      oid = @store.hash_object(data)
      index[file] = oid
      puts "added #{file}"
    end
    write_index(index)
  end

  def commit(message)
    index = read_index
    if index.empty?
      puts "nothing to commit"
      return
    end
    # Save a snapshot of the index as a commit object:
    tree = index.map { |k, v| "#{k} #{v}" }.join("\n")
    tree_oid = @store.hash_object(tree, type: "tree")
    parent = read_head
    commit_content = "tree #{tree_oid}\n"
    commit_content += "parent #{parent}\n" if parent && !parent.empty?
    commit_content += "msg #{message}\n"
    commit_oid = @store.hash_object(commit_content, type: "commit")
    # Write HEAD
    write_head(commit_oid)
    puts "[#{commit_oid[0,7]}] #{message}"
  end

  def log
    oid = read_head
    if !oid || oid.strip.empty?
      puts "no commits yet"
      return
    end
    while oid && !oid.strip.empty?
      data = @store.read_object(oid, "commit")
      tree = data[/(?<=^tree )\w+/, 0]
      parent = data[/(?<=^parent )\w+/, 0]
      msg = data[/(?<=^msg ).+/, 0]
      puts "commit #{oid}"
      puts "    #{msg}"
      oid = parent
    end
  end

  def status
    index = read_index
    wd_files = Dir.glob("**/*", File::FNM_DOTMATCH).select { |f| File.file?(f) && !f.start_with?(".minigit/") && !f.start_with?('.') }
    staged = index.keys
    untracked = wd_files - staged
    puts "Changes to be committed:"
    staged.each do |file|
      puts "  new file:   #{file}"
    end
    puts "\nUntracked files:"
    untracked.each do |file|
      puts "  #{file}"
    end
  end

  private

  def read_index
    index_file = File.join(GIT_DIR, "index")
    return {} unless File.exist?(index_file)
    lines = File.read(index_file).split("\n")
    lines.map { |l| l.strip.split(/\s+/, 2) }.to_h
  end

  def write_index(index)
    index_file = File.join(GIT_DIR, "index")
    File.write(index_file, index.map { |k, v| "#{k} #{v}" }.join("\n"))
  end

  def read_head
    head_file = File.join(GIT_DIR, "HEAD")
    File.exist?(head_file) ? File.read(head_file).strip : nil
  end

  def write_head(oid)
    head_file = File.join(GIT_DIR, "HEAD")
    File.write(head_file, oid)
  end
end
```

```ruby
require 'digest/sha1'

class ObjectStore
  def initialize(gitdir)
    @gitdir = gitdir
    @objects = File.join(gitdir, "objects")
  end

  def hash_object(data, type: "blob")
    content = "#{type}\0#{data}"
    oid = Digest::SHA1.hexdigest(content)
    path = object_path(oid)
    File.write(path, content, mode: "wb") unless File.exist?(path)
    oid
  end

  def read_object(oid, type = nil)
    path = object_path(oid)
    raise "object not found: #{oid}" unless File.exist?(path)
    content = File.binread(path)
    expect_type, data = content.split("\0", 2)
    raise "bad object" if type && expect_type != type
    data
  end

  def object_path(oid)
    File.join(@objects, oid)
  end
end
```
